books.title: Isha Upanishad
books.description: One of the shortest and most condensed of the principal Upanishads. 18 verses on the all-pervading nature of the Self.
books.source: Public domain Sanskrit. English: original paraphrase by the Divya Granth project.

books.title: Shiva Ashtakam
books.description: Eight verses in praise of Lord Shiva. A beloved Shaiva hymn recited at dawn.
books.source: Traditional, public domain. Paraphrase by the Divya Granth project.
